scope: all remaining Wave 11 DEFERRED rows NOT in W11A (monolith carves >1k LOC), W11B (numba CI bugs + cross-package underscore ALLOWLIST), W11C (W10C test deferred residue)

A2#4 / S32.notes: _DEFAULT_DATE_METHODS now copied per-call so callers cannot mutate the module-level singleton; aligns with persisted train/predict replay map invariant in _phase_helpers_fit_pipeline.

A2#5 / S33.reason: Adding year/week/quarter/is_weekend/tz handling to _DEFAULT_DATE_METHODS is a behavior change for standalone callers (feature count silently grows). is_weekend is not a pandas .dt accessor, week_of_year requires .isocalendar().week; non-trivial cross-backend wiring. The suite-side _phase_helpers_fit_pipeline already supports per-FeatureTypesConfig richer methods; the standalone-call default change has higher blast radius than the suite path.

A2#6 / S34.reason: bruteforce.run_pysr_feature_engineering to_pandas + sub-frame fillna broadcast-copy: requires PySR pandas-only constraint dance; >30 LOC fix involving polars-native median impute + byte-size gate. Architectural redesign of the PySR-side data hand-off.

A2#8 / S36.reason: create_aggregated_features recursive subset .copy() refactor: requires view-only iloc indexing across 35-line recursion + idx_mask reuse. >30 LOC behavioral refactor.

A2#11 / S39.reason: bruteforce rename mutating caller frame: requires fresh DataFrame copy after column rename or loud documentation. Same as A2#6 - architectural decision about the bruteforce hand-off contract.

A2#12 / S40.notes: _ratio_fit now guards np.median on empty array via base_finite.any(); falls through to documented 1e-12 eps floor. Catches NumPy 2.x hard-error path.

Belongs in a dedicated unit-test-coverage wave.

A3#2 / S41.notes: Module-top comment promised a WARN at test.* fallback use but code never delivered. WARN now emitted inside the loop at resolution time with the winning flavour name; oof-resolved winners stay silent.

A3#3 / S42.reason: Probability calibration before classifier blend: AP12 calibration policy landed at single-model level (783eae4c W9A pick_best_calibrator) but ensemble-time integration is non-trivial wiring across score_ensemble / compare_ensembles / _rrf_aggregate_probs. >30 LOC architectural change.

A3#4 / S43.notes: _rrf_aggregate_probs K=1 path now emits one-line WARN so production callers stamping AUC/logloss on the raw RRF score (not a calibrated probability) become grep-able in suite logs. Sigmoid auto-transform / hard error deferred as behavior change.

A5#4 / S51.reason: Per-target select_target template rebuild: cross-target memoization is architectural (needs cache key sharing across target loop, downstream invariants for fit_state and predict-side replay). >30 LOC behavioral change.

A5#5 / S52.reason: DiscoveryCache vs SuiteArtefactCache unification (now subsumed by AP15 joint-stash proposal). Observability landed via 65b3dded (W10B); full unification pending user OK.

A5#7 / S54.notes: MLFRAME_PRE_PIPELINE_CACHE_MAX (count cap env override) + MLFRAME_PRE_PIPELINE_CACHE_MAX_BYTES (byte-budget LRU eviction, 0 disables) added. _approx_entry_bytes uses nbytes / memory_usage(deep=False) / estimated_size with fallback to 0 on unfamiliar carriers.

B2#37 / B2#39 / B2#40 / B2#42 / B2#44 (c.reason: Cluster of low-tier test-infra cosmetics (instafail addopts, pytest_plugins root location, _coverage_active dead code, thinc seed-overflow shim, --instafail in addopts). Each is a 1-3 LOC change; bundled defer to keep this manifest focused on correctness wins.

B2#38 (suppress_convergence_warnings aut.reason: Autouse catch_warnings + filterwarnings('ignore') interaction with pytest.warns is subtle; pytest.warns nests its own catch_warnings so child filter resets ARE supposed to win, but the audit flag is real for some pytest versions. Safer fix needs a marker-aware suppression OR moving to filterwarnings pyproject section. Defer pending behavior survey.

C1 monolith carves (W11A scope).reason: Wave 11A (monolith carves >1k LOC). Excluded per W11D task description.

AP5 nightly findings (mps.py:129, biz_nj.reason: Wave 11B (numba CI bugs). Excluded per W11D task description. Already addressed in commits 290bd967 (mps) + cd6669a6 (biz_njit_poly_eval) by sibling W11B agent.

AP15 (DiscoveryCache + SuiteArtefactCach.reason: Read the W10B-landed proposal (c70c9317). Three options enumerated (do-nothing / DiscoveryCache-on-top / shared backend Protocol). Implementation is a multi-file refactor (composite_cache.py + suite_artefact_cache.py + backend Protocol + 6+ siblings) that changes eviction semantics (cross-cache eviction, filelock LRU sidecar -> mtime-based ordering). DOES NOT implement; awaiting user approval. Recommendation in proposal: Option A (do nothing) for now; Option C (shared backend Protocol) is the safer landing pattern for a future wave.
